thread.title: Fifian Adeningsi Mus is committed to creating an intelligent and happy regency of the Sula Islands –
thread.title_full: Fifian Adeningsi Mus is committed to creating an intelligent and happy regency of the Sula Islands –

author: archyworldyscom
title: Fifian Adeningsi Mus is committed to creating an intelligent and happy regency of the Sula Islands –
text:
The pair of incumbent candidates for Regent and Vice Regent, Fifian Adeningsi Mus and Saleh Marasabessy (FAM-SAH) explained their vision and mission during the second public debate for the Sula Pilkada Islands Regency held by the Islands Regency Regional KPU Sula. Photo: FAM-SAH Timses
jpnn.com JAKARTA – The Sula Islands Regency Regional KPU recently held the second public debate for the Sula Pilkada Islands Regency.
In this second debate, the pair of incumbent candidates, Fifian Adeningsi Mus and Saleh Marasabessy (FAM-SAH), explained their vision and mission with full optimism and enthusiasm.
The number 2 regent and vice regent candidate pair looked confident in facing the opposing candidate pairs, namely the Ihsan Umaternate-Darwis Gorontalo candidate pair and the Hendrata Thes-Natsir Sangadji candidate pair.
In the debate, Fifian Adeningsi Mus explained his vision and mission very clearly and directly.
Fifian explained that his vision remains the same, namely the vision of creating a Happy Gannet. Happiness itself is a slogan taken from a combination of the words Clean, Safe, Excellent, Fair, Enterprising, Innovative and Religious.
Fifian said the first step the FAM-SAH candidate pairs will take for Sula Bahagia will be human resources (HR) augmentation.
“We all know that the progress of a region depends on the quality of the people who live there. Therefore, educational programs will be our main priority. From basic education to tertiary education, we will improve the facilities and infrastructure at STAI Babussalam and build the University of Sula , we will ensure that every child in Sula receives a decent education, which is not only adequate in terms of quantity, but also of quality, educate our sons and daughters. “Sula, there are no more dropouts,” Fifian said, Tuesday (11/18/2024).
According to Fifian, the FAM-SAH will also improve the quality of teachers, health workers and state civil servants (ASNs), thus ensuring better public services.
The incumbent candidate couple for Regent and Vice Regent, Fifian Adeningsi Mus and Saleh Marasabessy (FAM-SAH), expressed their vision and mission with full optimism and enthusiasm.
